name: UV Protection Sunglasses
description: Stylish UV400 protection sunglasses perfect for summer outings. Lightweight frame with polarized lenses that eliminate glare.

name: Floral Summer Dress
description: Light and airy floral summer dress made from 100% breathable cotton. Perfect for beach days or casual outings.

name: SPF 50 Sunscreen Lotion
description: Broad-spectrum SPF 50 sunscreen that protects against UVA and UVB rays. Water-resistant for up to 80 minutes.

name: Beach Tote Bag
description: Spacious durable beach tote bag made from eco-friendly canvas. Large enough to carry towels, sunscreen, snacks, and more.

name: Cooling Hydration Mist
description: Instant cooling facial mist infused with cucumber extract and hyaluronic acid. Refreshes skin on hot summer days.

name: Inflatable Pool Float
description: Giant flamingo-shaped inflatable pool float for ultimate summer fun. Made from durable puncture-resistant PVC.

name: Straw Sun Hat
description: Wide-brimmed natural straw hat offering excellent sun protection. UPF 50+ rating blocks over 98% of UV rays.

name: Waterproof Sandals
description: Comfortable waterproof sandals designed for beach and water activities. Quick-dry straps with adjustable buckles.
